title: lithocarpus sieboldii
intro: Lithocarpus sieboldii, also known as the Japanese stone pine, is a species of evergreen tree in the family Fagaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus sieboldii include antioxidant activity, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress, as well as potential anti-cancer properties. Lithocarpus sieboldii can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its extracts are also used in traditional Chinese medicine.
